scenario.name: REGISTER
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: sip:test@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0 Expires: 3600

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: sip:test@[local_ip]:[local_port] [authentication username=test password=test] Content-Length: 0 Expires: 3600
